name: @anizoptera/publish-clean
description: Publish pnpm workspace packages from a cleaned, validated package tarball.
author: Anizoptera

scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run claude-link:check && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run test:built && bun run tracked-artifacts:check && bun run cleaned-artifact:check
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "console.error('Use pnpm run publish:clean to publish the cleaned artifact.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.publish:clean: bun run check && node dist/cli.js -- --access public --tag latest --provenance
scripts.test: bun run build && bun run test:built
scripts.test:built: bunx vitest run && bun test test/*.bun.test.ts
